name: ラミィの大冒険 1&2 リメイク / Rammy's Great Adventure 1 & 2 Remake
short_description: The full remake of the randomly generated dungeon RPG "Rammy's Great Adventure 1 & 2" is here! Join tomboy treasure hunter Rammy for hidden treasures. Revamped controls and UI, nostalgic pixel art. Challenge Mode, new foes, encyclopedia, color options, and online rankings.
detailed_description:
◆Story

・Rammy's Great Adventure 1

Rammy is a tomboyish treasure hunter. She travels the world in search of hidden treasures.

One day, Rammy set off to explore a cave said to hold a treasure, but her rival Lilith stole her map. Will Rammy manage to find the treasure?

・Rammy's Great Adventure 2

After their previous adventure, Rammy and Lilith became good friends. Seeking new adventures, they travelled to a distant southern island.

As they ventured deep into the island's forest, a huge monster suddenly appeared and carried Lilith off. Oh dear! Can Rammy rescue Lilith?

◆The Mysterious Dungeon awaiting Rammy!

A roguelike RPG in the Mysterious Dungeon style, where the map layout, scattered items, and monster placement and numbers change randomly with every challenge. Each playthrough presents a different situation, testing the player's judgement and adaptability.

Utilise the tools gathered during exploration to build your strength, and advance towards the deepest depths by applying your knowledge and experience!

◆Additional Feature ①: High-Difficulty ‘Challenge Mode’ and ‘Extra Story’!

We've added a ‘Challenge Mode’ not found in the original ‘Rammy's Great Adventure’!

Take on a high-difficulty dungeon filled with new monsters like “Kattatchama” and new equipment! Clear Challenge Mode to unlock an ‘Extra Story’ too!

◆Additional Feature ②: The “Encyclopaedia Function” for viewing stories and settings!

Achieve the conditions to unlock hidden stories and settings for Rammy, Lilith, enemy monsters, and various items! Aim to complete the encyclopaedia by fulfilling all conditions!

◆Additional Feature ③: Rammy's Colour Change Function

As you fulfil the conditions for the encyclopaedia feature, Rammy's colours will be unlocked!

Try unlocking all the colours, each with its own motif! Can you guess what the motifs are?

◆Additional Feature ④: Online Ranking System

Featuring an online ranking system based on clear times and turns used! Aim for the top spots in both ‘Normal Mode’ and ‘Challenge Mode’!

◆About This Title

・A full remake using the Unity engine of the dungeon-crawling RPGs ‘Rammy's Great Adventure 1’ and ‘Rammy's Great Adventure 2’, where dungeons change randomly!

・Retains the nostalgic pixel art while revamping controls, UI, and graphics for modern play!

・Adds numerous features including high-difficulty dungeons, colour-changing functionality, an encyclopaedia feature, and online rankings!

・Stories unfold according to progress in both 1 and 2, with additional story content!

Japanese*, English
